features: Luxury 250ml bath bubbles, 250ml shower gel, 100ml body butter and 100ml body scrub
Perfect for unwinding after a long day
Baylis & Harding's iconic Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond Oil fragrance
description: Product Description Indulge in blissful relaxation with our body pamper gift set containing 250ml bath bubbles, 250ml shower gel, 100ml body butter and 100ml body scrub. This luxurious collection brings spa-quality indulgence straight to your home. Feminine blends of jojoba, rich vanilla and sweet almond oil characterise this beautifully opulent collection. Inspired by trending astrological beauty aesthetics, our Jojoba, Vanilla & Almond oil collection is brought to life through sustainable metallics, multi-faceted shimmers and a celestial colour palette of frosted pink and warm peach, complimented with a holographic foil. Glamourous and luxurious, our most indulgent fragrance. Gentle notes of vanilla have been blended with subtle notes of almond oil and the sweetness of jojoba to create a truly sensuous and alluring fragrance. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.SHOWER GEL: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Vanillin.BODY BUTTER: Aqua (Water, Eau), Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Glyceryl Stearate, Stearic Acid, Glycerin, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum (Fragrance), Carbomer, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Coumarin, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Vanillin.BODY SCRUB: Aqua (Water, Eau), Peg-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Microcrystalline Cellulose, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Chlorphenesin, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Hydroxide, Vanillin. Directions Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Shower Gel - Lather & Rinse. Body Butter - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Body Scrub - Massage Gently Into Skin And Rinse. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
